name: taskferry
description: MCP server exposing a first-class background-dispatch tool for the opencode CLI

scripts.test:integration: node src/smoke-test.js && node src/cancel-smoke-test.js && node src/poll-smoke-test.js
scripts.check: git ls-files '*.js' | xargs -P4 -I{} node --check {} && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
